sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Terminology 20:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Terminology 20:1
items.html: This is the Guf of Partzuf Hochma of AK, called Partzuf AB of AK. There is another, second phase of the second expansion, which is Partzuf Bina of AK, called Partzuf SAG of AK.
